steps.title: Read Heidi's reaction
steps.content: Heidi looks at the pictures with wondering eyes, screams when she sees the peaceful pasture scene, and then devours the scene with glowing eyes. The surrounding details show excitement and fascination, not distress.

steps.title: State the main idea
steps.content: Choice A invents that Heidi was upset beforehand. Choice C misreads the scream as fear. Choice D invents a reason involving never having seen a shepherd before. The remaining choice captures Heidi's delighted fascination with the image. The answer is B.
